Description: A sturdy tackle using its shell as a battering ram.
DescriptionEn: A sturdy tackle using its shell as a battering ram.
DescriptionFr: Un solide plaquage utilisant sa carapace comme bélier.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 25 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 25 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 25 dégâts physiques à un ennemi.
